builds.description: A handloom saree house where you choose the weave, the drape and the blouse tailoring — with a live, itemised price.
A neighbourhood Indian bakery for fresh daily bakes and made-to-order cakes, built around a running order pad.
On-demand dog walking — book a vetted walker, follow every walk live, and get a photo report when they're home.
Fine jewellery with a live, itemised price breakup, BIS & IGI certification and lifetime buyback.
A home-cooked tiffin subscription where you choose every meal, managed from a clean daily dashboard.
Rent a fruit tree for the season and have its harvest picked, packed and shipped to your door.
